languages.text: "Одних пугает ваш флагман. Много новых людей, много новых мест и запахов. Другие рады были покинуть Зарков, но все вокруг новое, а это сбивает с толку. Ничего, дайте время и мы ваш корабль будем знать не хуже корней вокруг Клети".

"Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."
languages.original_text: "Одних пугает ваш флагман. Много новых людей, много новых мест и запахов. Другие рады были покинуть Зарков, но все вокруг новое, а это сбивает с толку. Ничего, дайте время и мы ваш корабль будем знать не хуже корней вокруг Клети".

traits.locale_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new people, new sights, new smells. Others were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but this novelty is disorienting. It's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

"Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

"You know how an animal behaves when it's caged? They're like that. Some of them are suspicious, and it makes them jumpy. Others are pleased, but still nervous. But not to worry, Lord Captain, just give it time."

"Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new people, new sights, new smells. Others were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but this novelty is disorienting. It's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

"Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

languages.text: 「動物を檻に入れると、どう振る舞うか知っていますか？彼らもそうなのです。疑心暗鬼で、神経質になっている者もいれば、喜んでいるけれど、まだ不安な者もいます。でもご安心ください、キャプテン。時間をかけてあげれば、きっと落ち着きます」
languages.original_text: "You know how an animal behaves when it's caged? They're like that. Some of them are suspicious, and it makes them jumpy. Others are pleased, but still nervous. But not to worry, Lord Captain, just give it time."

languages.text: "Sancak geminiz bazılarını korkutuyor. Çok fazla yeni yüz, yeni manzara, yeni koku. Bazıları Zarkov'u arkalarında bırakmaktan mutluydu ama tüm bu yenilikler kafa karıştırıcı. Gerçi önemli değil. Bize zaman verin, bu gemiyi Kafes'in etrafındaki kökleri bildiğimiz kadar iyi öğreniriz."
languages.original_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

traits.locale_text: "Sancak geminiz bazılarını korkutuyor. Çok fazla yeni yüz, yeni manzara, yeni koku. Bazıları Zarkov'u arkalarında bırakmaktan mutluydu ama tüm bu yenilikler kafa karıştırıcı. Gerçi önemli değil. Bize zaman verin, bu gemiyi Kafes'in etrafındaki kökleri bildiğimiz kadar iyi öğreniriz."

languages.text: “您的旗舰让一些人感到不安。太多陌生的面孔、景象和气味。有些人倒是很高兴能抛开扎尔科夫，但这些新鲜事物令人迷失。不过没关系，给我们点时间，我们会像熟悉牢笼周围的根系那样熟悉这艘船。”
languages.original_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

traits.locale_text: “您的旗舰让一些人感到不安。太多陌生的面孔、景象和气味。有些人倒是很高兴能抛开扎尔科夫，但这些新鲜事物令人迷失。不过没关系，给我们点时间，我们会像熟悉牢笼周围的根系那样熟悉这艘船。”

languages.text: "Euer Flaggschiff macht einigen von ihnen Angst. Zu viele neue Gesichter, Eindrücke und Gerüche. Einige waren froh, Zarkov hinter sich zu lassen, aber das ist alles ziemlich verwirrend. Aber das wird schon. Gebt uns etwas Zeit, dann kennen wir dieses Schiff genauso gut wie die Wurzeln um den Käfig."
languages.original_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Flaggschiff macht einigen von ihnen Angst. Zu viele neue Gesichter, Eindrücke und Gerüche. Einige waren froh, Zarkov hinter sich zu lassen, aber das ist alles ziemlich verwirrend. Aber das wird schon. Gebt uns etwas Zeit, dann kennen wir dieses Schiff genauso gut wie die Wurzeln um den Käfig."

languages.text: « Votre vaisseau amiral en effraie certains. Trop de visages, de paysages et d'odeurs inconnus. D'autres sont ravis d'avoir quitté Zarkov, mais ce nouvel environnement les rend nerveux. Pas d'inquiétude, cependant. Laissez-nous un peu de temps. Bientôt, ce vaisseau n'aura plus aucun secret pour nous, comme les racines de la Cage. »
languages.original_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

traits.locale_text: « Votre vaisseau amiral en effraie certains. Trop de visages, de paysages et d'odeurs inconnus. D'autres sont ravis d'avoir quitté Zarkov, mais ce nouvel environnement les rend nerveux. Pas d'inquiétude, cependant. Laissez-nous un peu de temps. Bientôt, ce vaisseau n'aura plus aucun secret pour nous, comme les racines de la Cage. »

languages.text: «Su nave insignia asusta a algunos. Demasiadas caras nuevas, vistas nuevas, olores nuevos... Hay quienes están encantados de abandonar Zarkov, pero tantas novedades los superan. No se preocupe. Si nos da un tiempo, acabaremos conociendo esta nave como si fueran las raíces en torno a la Jaula».
languages.original_text: "Your flagship scares some of them. Too many new faces, new sights, new smells. Some were happy to put Zarkov behind them, but all this novelty is disorienting. But it's nothing. Give us time, and we'll know this vessel as well as the roots around the Cage."

No se preocupe. Si nos da un tiempo, acabaremos conociendo esta nave como si fueran las raíces en torno a la Jaula».
